Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/api/analyze \\
  -F "files=@C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\test_nvidia_report.md" \\
  -F "files=@C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\DAFI RS\\投研网站\\投研网站\\AI_SETUP_GUIDE.md" \\
  2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
result = d['result']
print\('Summary:', result['summary'][:60] + '...'\)
print\('KeyPoints count:', len\(result.get\('keyPoints', []\)\)\)
print\('DeepAnalysis keys:', list\(result.get\('deepAnalysis', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)
print\('PhilosophyViews:', list\(result.get\('philosophyViews', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)
print\('VariantView:', result.get\('variantView'\) is not None\)
print\('PreMortem count:', len\(result.get\('preMortem', []\)\)\)
")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/api/analyze \\
  -F "files=@C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\test_nvidia_report.md" \\
  -F "files=@C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\DAFI RS\\投研网站\\投研网站\\AI_SETUP_GUIDE.md" \\
  2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
result = d['result']

# Check for null values in philosophyViews
pv = result.get\('philosophyViews', {}\)
for k, v in pv.items\(\):
    print\(f'{k}: view={v.get\(\\"view\\"\)}, reasoning={v.get\(\\"reasoning\\"\) is not None}'\)

# Check variantView
vv = result.get\('variantView', {}\)
print\(f'variantView: consensus={vv.get\(\\"consensus\\"\) is not None}, ourView={vv.get\(\\"ourView\\"\) is not None}, whyDifferent={vv.get\(\\"whyDifferent\\"\) is not None}'\)

# Check deepAnalysis
 da = result.get\('deepAnalysis', {}\)
for k, v in da.items\(\):
    if isinstance\(v, dict\):
        for kk, vv in v.items\(\):
            print\(f'deepAnalysis.{k}.{kk}: {vv is not None}'\)
")
